mnemonics.title: Pumping Parts
mnemonics.content: UVXYZ - Understand Various Yielding Zones (U cannot be pumped, V and Y can be pumped, X is the center, Z is the end)

mnemonics.title: Conditions Checklist
mnemonics.content: VIP Conditions: Variable repetition Intuition, |vxy| ≤ Pumping length, |vy| > 0 (Very Important Parts)
